coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-100 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 7:48 at 70%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 7:48 at 70%. The pace where you can contemplate life's mysteries. Like why you own a bike.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 90% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 10:00 at 90%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 90% for 10:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 10:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 10:00 at 90%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/8. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 20% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/8. You're 26% done. This is where average athletes quit. You're not average.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/8. 6 to go. You've accumulated 10min of supra-threshold work. Stay sharp on form.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/8. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 2/8. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/8. You've accumulated 10min of hard work. Quality over quantity from here.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 3:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 30% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 28 minutes of threshold work done. Block 3/8. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue building. 13min threshold work accumulated. Maintain 75-85 rpm — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 3/8. 100% for 8:00. You can hold this. Trust your training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 3/8. This is fine. Everything is fine. (Narrator: nothing was fine.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 3/8. 49 minutes left. Maintain focus. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 21min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 5:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 55% for 5:00. Then 44min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 5:00 at 55%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.
